> 515 строк, 20,869 байт

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}{{ event.name }} - Система управления турнирами{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row justify-content-between align-items-lg-start gap-3 mb-4">
    <div>
        <h2 class="mb-2">
            <i class="fas fa-trophy me-2"></i>{{ event.name }}
        </h2>
        <div class="event-info-summary">
            <p class="text-muted mb-1">
                <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt me-1"></i>
                <strong>{{ event.place or 'Место не указано' }}</strong>
            </p>
            <p class="text-muted mb-1">
                <i class="fas fa-calendar me-1"></i>
                {% if event.begin_date %}
                    <strong>{{ event.begin_date.strftime('%d.%m.%Y') }}</strong>
                    {% if event.end_date and event.end_date != event.begin_date %}
                        - {{ event.end_date.strftime('%d.%m.%Y') }}
                    {% endif %}
                {% else %}
                    Даты не указаны
                {% endif %}
            </p>
            <p class="text-muted mb-1 small">
                Всего категорий: {{ category_groups|length }} · Участников: {{ total_participants }}
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-flex flex-column gap-2">
        <span class="badge bg-{{ 'success' if event.status == 'A' else 'secondary' }} fs-6">
            {{ 'Активный' if event.status == 'A' else 'Завершен' }}
        </span>
    </div>
</div>

{% if judges %}
<div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">
    <div class="card-header">
        <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-gavel me-2"></i>Судейская бригада</h5>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        {% set role_groups = {
            'Технический контролер': [],
            'Технический специалист': [],
            'Оператор ввода данных': [],
            'Оператор видеоповтора': [],
            'Рефери (Старший судья)': [],
            'Судья': []
        } %}
        {% for judge in judges %}
            {% if judge.roles %}
                {% set main_role = None %}
                {% for role in judge.roles %}
                    {% if 'Технический контролер' in role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Технический контролер' %}
                    {% elif 'Технический специалист' in role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Технический специалист' %}
                    {% elif 'Оператор ввода данных' in role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Оператор ввода данных' %}
                    {% elif 'Оператор видеоповтора' in role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Оператор видеоповтора' %}
                    {% elif 'Рефери' in role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Рефери (Старший судья)' %}
                    {% elif 'Судья' in role and not main_role %}
                        {% set main_role = 'Судья' %}
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}
                {% if main_role and main_role in role_groups %}
                    {% set _ = role_groups[main_role].append(judge) %}
                {% else %}
                    {% set _ = role_groups['Судья'].append(judge) %}
                {% endif %}
            {% else %}
                {% set _ = role_groups['Судья'].append(judge) %}
            {% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
        
        {% for role_name, judges_in_role in role_groups.items() %}
            {% if judges_in_role %}
            <div class="mb-4">
                <h6 class="text-muted mb-2">
                    {% if role_name == 'Технический контролер' %}
                        <i class="fas fa-user-shield me-1"></i>Технические контролеры
                    {% elif role_name == 'Технический специалист' %}
                        <i class="fas fa-user-cog me-1"></i>Технические специалисты
                    {% elif role_name == 'Оператор ввода данных' %}
                        <i class="fas fa-keyboard me-1"></i>Операторы ввода данных
                    {% elif role_name == 'Оператор видеоповтора' %}
                        <i class="fas fa-video me-1"></i>Операторы видеоповтора
                    {% elif role_name == 'Рефери (Старший судья)' %}
                        <i class="fas fa-gavel me-1"></i>Рефери
                    {% else %}
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie me-1"></i>Судьи
                    {% endif %}
                </h6>
                <div class="row g-3">
                    {% for judge in judges_in_role %}
                    <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-start">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-tie text-primary me-2 mt-1"></i>
                            <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                <strong>{{ judge.name }}</strong>
                                {% if judge.country %}
                                <span class="badge bg-secondary ms-2">{{ judge.country }}</span>
                                {% endif %}
                                {% if judge.roles %}
                                <div class="mt-1">
                                    {% for role in judge.roles %}
                                    <span class="badge bg-info me-1 mb-1">{{ role }}</span>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                                {% endif %}
                                {% if judge.qualification %}
                                <div class="mt-1">
                                    <small class="text-muted">{{ judge.qualification }}</small>
                                </div>
                                {% endif %}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
            </div>
            {% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">
    <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 align-items-center">
            <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
                <div class="input-group">
                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></span>
                    <input type="search" id="categorySearch" class="form-control" placeholder="Поиск по категории или спортсмену (гибкий поиск, любой регистр)">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6 col-md-4 col-lg-3">
                <select class="form-select" id="categorySort">
                    <option value="participants">По числу участников</option>
                    <option value="name">По названию</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6 col-md-4 col-lg-3">
                <div class="form-check form-switch ps-0">
                    <input class="form-check-input ms-0" type="checkbox" id="hideEmpty" checked>
                    <label class="form-check-label ms-3" for="hideEmpty">Скрывать пустые</label>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<p id="categorySummary" class="text-muted small mb-3"></p>

<div id="categoriesAccordion" class="accordion"></div>

<!-- Быстрые действия -->
<div class="card mt-4">
    <div class="card-header">
        <h5><i class="fas fa-bolt"></i> Быстрые действия</h5>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row g-2">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100" onclick="exportResults()">
                    <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Экспорт результатов
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-info w-100" onclick="printResults()">
                    <i class="fas fa-print"></i> Печать результатов
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-success w-100" onclick="shareResults()">
                    <i class="fas fa-share"></i> Поделиться
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
.category-accordion-item .accordion-button {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
    .category-accordion-item .accordion-button {
        flex-direction: row;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
    }
}

.category-header-meta {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 1rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--bs-secondary);
}

.category-header-meta .badge {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
}

.category-accordion-item .accordion-body {
    background-color: #fcfcfd;
}

.category-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--bs-secondary);
    padding: 2rem 1rem;
    border: 1px dashed rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    border-radius: 0.75rem;
    background: #fff;
}

.category-stat-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.65rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(33, 37, 41, 0.05);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.category-stat-pill i {
    color: #0d6efd;
}

.category-table thead th {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: #fff;
    color: #333 !important; /* Темный текст на белом фоне */
    z-index: 1;
}

.category-table tbody tr:hover {
    background-color: rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.05);
}

.event-info-summary {
    padding-left: 0.25rem;
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
const categoryGroups = {{ category_groups_json | safe }};
const expandedCategories = new Set();

function formatPoints(value) {
    if (value === null || value === undefined) {
        return '—';
    }
    // Баллы уже приходят правильно отформатированными с бэкенда
    const numValue = Number(value);
    if (isNaN(numValue)) {
        return '—';
    }
    return numValue.toFixed(2);
}

function formatPlace(value) {
    if (value === null || value === undefined) {
        return '—';
    }
    return value;
}

function renderCategoryAccordion(groups) {
    const accordion = document.getElementById('categoriesAccordion');
    if (!groups || groups.length === 0) {
        accordion.innerHTML = `
            <div class="category-empty">
                <i class="fas fa-layer-group fa-3x mb-3"></i>
                <p class="mb-0">Категорий не найдено</p>
            </div>
        `;
        updateSummary(0, 0);
        return;
    }

    let visibleCount = 0;
    let totalAthletes = 0;

    accordion.innerHTML = groups.map((group, index) => {
        if (group.num_participants === 0 && document.getElementById('hideEmpty')?.checked) {
            return '';
        }

        visibleCount++;
        totalAthletes += group.participants.length;

        const isExpanded = expandedCategories.has(group.id);
        const collapseId = `categoryCollapse${group.id}`;

        const genderIcon = group.gender === 'F' ? 'venus' : group.gender === 'M' ? 'mars' : 'venus-mars';
        const genderLabel = group.gender === 'F' ? 'Женский' : group.gender === 'M' ? 'Мужской' : 'Смешанный';

        return `
            <div class="accordion-item category-accordion-item mb-2">
                <h2 class="accordion-header">
                    <button class="accordion-button ${isExpanded ? '' : 'collapsed'}" 
                            type="button" 
                            data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
                            data-bs-target="#${collapseId}"
                            onclick="toggleCategory(${group.id})">
                        <div class="w-100">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start w-100">
                                <strong class="me-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-medal me-1"></i>${group.name}
                                </strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="category-header-meta mt-2">
                                <span class="category-stat-pill">
                                    <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
                                    <span>${group.num_participants} участн.</span>
                                </span>
                                <span class="category-stat-pill">
                                    <i class="fas fa-${genderIcon}"></i>
                                    <span>${genderLabel}</span>
                                </span>
                                ${group.category_type ? `
                                <span class="category-stat-pill">
                                    <i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i>
                                    <span>${group.category_type}</span>
                                </span>` : ''}
                                ${group.free_participations > 0 ? `
                                <span class="badge bg-success">
                                    <i class="fas fa-gift"></i> ${group.free_participations} бесплатных
                                </span>` : ''}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                </h2>
                <div id="${collapseId}" 
                     class="accordion-collapse collapse ${isExpanded ? 'show' : ''}" 
                     data-bs-parent="#categoriesAccordion">
                    <div class="accordion-body">
                        ${renderParticipantsTable(group.participants, group.id)}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }).join('');

    updateSummary(visibleCount, totalAthletes);
}

function renderParticipantsTable(participants, categoryId) {
    if (!participants || participants.length === 0) {
        return `
            <div class="text-center text-muted py-3">
                <i class="fas fa-user-slash fa-2x mb-2"></i>
                <p class="mb-0">Участники не найдены</p>
            </div>
        `;
    }

    return `
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-sm table-hover category-table mb-0">
                <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th style="width: 5%">Место</th>
                        <th style="width: 25%">Спортсмен</th>
                        <th style="width: 20%">Школа</th>
                        <th style="width: 20%">Тренер</th>
                        <th style="width: 10%">Баллы</th>
                        <th style="width: 10%">Бесплатно</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    ${participants.map(p => {
                        const isWithdrawn = p.status === 'R' || p.status === 'W';
                        const rowClass = p.free ? 'table-success' : (isWithdrawn ? 'table-warning' : '');
                        return `
                        <tr class="${rowClass}">
                            <td class="text-center">
                                ${p.place !== null ? `<strong>${p.place}</strong>` : (isWithdrawn ? '<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark" title="Снята с соревнований"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></span>' : '—')}
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="/athlete/${p.athlete.id}" class="text-decoration-none">
                                    ${p.athlete.full_name || ''}
                                </a>
                                ${isWithdrawn ? '<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark ms-2" title="Снята с соревнований"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> Снята</span>' : ''}
                                ${p.free ? '<span class="badge bg-success ms-2">БЕСП</span>' : ''}
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                ${p.club ? `<a href="/club/${p.club.id}" class="text-decoration-none text-muted small">${p.club.name}</a>` : '<span class="text-muted">—</span>'}
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                ${p.coach ? `<span class="text-muted small">${p.coach}</span>` : '<span class="text-muted">—</span>'}
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center">
                                ${p.points !== null ? formatPoints(p.points) : (isWithdrawn ? '<span class="text-muted" title="Снята с соревнований">—</span>' : '—')}
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center">
                                ${p.free ? '<span class="badge bg-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></span>' : '—'}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    `;
                    }).join('')}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    `;
}

function toggleCategory(categoryId) {
    if (expandedCategories.has(categoryId)) {
        expandedCategories.delete(categoryId);
    } else {
        expandedCategories.add(categoryId);
    }
}

function updateSummary(visibleCount, totalAthletes) {
    const summary = document.getElementById('categorySummary');
    if (!summary) return;
    
    const totalCategories = categoryGroups.length;
    summary.textContent = `Показано категорий: ${visibleCount} из ${totalCategories} · Спортсменов: ${totalAthletes}`;
}

function filterAndSortCategories() {
    const searchTerm = document.getElementById('categorySearch')?.value.trim() || '';
    const sortBy = document.getElementById('categorySort')?.value || 'participants';
    const hideEmpty = document.getElementById('hideEmpty')?.checked ?? true;

    let filtered = categoryGroups.filter(group => {
        if (hideEmpty && group.num_participants === 0) {
            return false;
        }
        
        if (!searchTerm) {
            return true;
        }

        // Поиск по названию категории
        if (matchesSearch(group.name, searchTerm)) {
            return true;
        }

        // Поиск по спортсменам
        return group.participants.some(p => {
            const fullName = p.athlete.full_name || '';
            return matchesSearch(fullName, searchTerm);
        });
    });

    // Сортировка
    filtered.sort((a, b) => {
        if (sortBy === 'participants') {
            return b.num_participants - a.num_participants;
        } else if (sortBy === 'name') {
            return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        }
        return 0;
    });

    renderCategoryAccordion(filtered);
}

function exportResults() {
    const eventId = {{ event.id }};
    window.location.href = `/api/event/${eventId}/export`;
}

function printResults() {
    window.print();
}

function shareResults() {
    if (navigator.share) {
        navigator.share({
            title: '{{ event.name }}',
            text: 'Результаты турнира по фигурному катанию',
            url: window.location.href
        });
    } else {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href).then(() => {
            alert('Ссылка скопирована в буфер обмена');
        });
    }
}

// Инициализация
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    renderCategoryAccordion(categoryGroups);
    
    document.getElementById('categorySearch')?.addEventListener('input', filterAndSortCategories);
    document.getElementById('categorySort')?.addEventListener('change', filterAndSortCategories);
    document.getElementById('hideEmpty')?.addEventListener('change', filterAndSortCategories);
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

```


---

## Исходный код: `templates/events.html`

> 471 строк, 19,813 байт

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Турниры - Система управления турнирами{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    /* Стили для статистики */
    .alert-info h5 {
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        color: #0c5460;
    }
    
    /* Мобильная адаптация для страницы турниров */
    @media (max-width: 992px) {
        .row.mb-4 .col-md-4 {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
    }
    
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .d-flex.justify-content-between {
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: stretch !important;
            gap: 1rem;
        }
        
        .btn {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .btn-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.25rem;
        }
        
        .btn-group .btn {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;
        }
        
        .table-responsive {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
        }
        
        .table th,
        .table td {
            padding: 0.5rem 0.25rem;
        }
        
        .badge {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
        }
        
        .card-body {
            padding: 0.75rem;
        }
        
        .alert-info h5 {
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        
        .alert-info p {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }
    }
    
    @media (max-width: 576px) {
        .table th:nth-child(3),
        .table td:nth-child(3) {
            display: none;
        }
        
        .table th:nth-child(4),
        .table td:nth-child(4) {
            display: none;
        }
        
        .table th,
        .table td {
            padding: 0.375rem 0.125rem;
        }
        
        .btn-group .btn {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            padding: 0.25rem 0.375rem;
        }
        
        .event-name {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .event-place {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #6c757d;
        }
    }
    
    /* Стили для кликабельных строк */
    .clickable-row {
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
    }
    
    .clickable-row:hover {
        background-color: rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.08);
    }
    
    .clickable-row:active {
        background-color: rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.15);
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <h2><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> Турниры</h2>
    <div class="d-flex gap-2">
        <div class="position-relative" style="width: 360px;">
            <input
                type="text"
                class="form-control"
                id="searchInput"
                placeholder="Поиск по названию, месту, площадке..."
                value="{{ search or '' }}"
            >
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="applySearch()">
            <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
        </button>
        {% if search %}
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="clearSearch()">
            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
        </button>
        {% endif %}
        <a href="{{ url_for('admin.upload_file') }}" class="btn btn-primary">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Добавить турнир
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

{% if seasons or available_ranks or available_months %}
<div class="row mb-4">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h6><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i> Фильтр по сезонам</h6>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary active" onclick="filterBySeason('all')">
                        Все сезоны
                    </button>
                    {% for season in seasons %}
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="filterBySeason('{{ season }}')">
                        {{ season }}
                    </button>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h6><i class="fas fa-calendar"></i> Фильтр по месяцам</h6>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <select class="form-select" id="monthFilter" onchange="changeMonthFilter()">
                    <option value="">Все месяцы</option>
                    {% for month in available_months %}
                    <option value="{{ month }}" {% if current_month_filter == month %}selected{% endif %}>
                        {{ month | format_month }}
                    </option>
                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h6><i class="fas fa-filter"></i> Сортировка и фильтры</h6>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="mb-2">
                    <label class="form-label mb-0">Сортировка:</label>
                    <div class="text-muted small">
                        Нажмите на заголовок столбца в таблице (Название, Место, Дата, Категории, Участники)
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="form-label">Фильтр по разряду:</label>
                    <select class="form-select" id="rankFilter" onchange="changeRankFilter()">
                        <option value="">Все разряды</option>
                        {% for rank in available_ranks %}
                        <option value="{{ rank }}" {% if current_rank_filter == rank %}selected{% endif %}>{{ rank }}</option>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

{% if current_month_filter and total_participants > 0 %}
<div class="alert alert-info mb-4">
    <h5><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Статистика за {{ current_month_filter | format_month }}</h5>
    <p class="mb-0">
        <strong>Общее количество участников по всем турнирам:</strong> 
        <span class="badge bg-primary" style="font-size: 1.2rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;">{{ total_participants }}</span>
    </p>
</div>
{% endif %}
{% endif %}

<div class="card">
    <div class="card-body">
        {% if events %}
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>
                                <a class="text-decoration-none link-dark" href="{{ url_for('public.events', search=search, rank=current_rank_filter, month=current_month_filter, sort_by='name', sort_order='desc' if current_sort_by == 'name' and current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'asc') }}">
                                    Название
                                    {% if current_sort_by == 'name' %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort-{{ 'up' if current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'down' }}"></i>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort text-muted"></i>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            <th>
                                <a class="text-decoration-none link-dark" href="{{ url_for('public.events', search=search, rank=current_rank_filter, month=current_month_filter, sort_by='place', sort_order='desc' if current_sort_by == 'place' and current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'asc') }}">
                                    Место проведения
                                    {% if current_sort_by == 'place' %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort-{{ 'up' if current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'down' }}"></i>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort text-muted"></i>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            <th>
                                <a class="text-decoration-none link-dark" href="{{ url_for('public.events', search=search, rank=current_rank_filter, month=current_month_filter, sort_by='begin_date', sort_order='desc' if current_sort_by == 'begin_date' and current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'asc') }}">
                                    Дата проведения
                                    {% if current_sort_by == 'begin_date' %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort-{{ 'up' if current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'down' }}"></i>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort text-muted"></i>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            <th>
                                <a class="text-decoration-none link-dark" href="{{ url_for('public.events', search=search, rank=current_rank_filter, month=current_month_filter, sort_by='categories_count', sort_order='desc' if current_sort_by == 'categories_count' and current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'asc') }}">
                                    Категории
                                    {% if current_sort_by == 'categories_count' %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort-{{ 'up' if current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'down' }}"></i>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort text-muted"></i>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            <th>
                                <a class="text-decoration-none link-dark" href="{{ url_for('public.events', search=search, rank=current_rank_filter, month=current_month_filter, sort_by='participants_count', sort_order='desc' if current_sort_by == 'participants_count' and current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'asc') }}">
                                    Количество выступивших детей
                                    {% if current_sort_by == 'participants_count' %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort-{{ 'up' if current_sort_order == 'asc' else 'down' }}"></i>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <i class="fas fa-sort text-muted"></i>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            <th>Действия</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for event in events %}
                        <tr class="clickable-row" onclick="goToEvent('{{ event.id }}')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                            <td>
                                <strong>{{ event.name }}</strong>
                                {% if event.long_name and event.long_name != event.name %}
                                    <br><small class="text-muted">{{ event.long_name }}</small>
                                {% endif %}
                                {% if event.venue %}
                                    <br><small class="text-info"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> {{ event.venue }}</small>
                                {% endif %}
                            </td>
                            <td>{{ event.place or 'Не указано' }}</td>
                            <td>
                                {% if event.begin_date %}
                                    <strong>{{ event.begin_date.strftime('%d.%m.%Y') }}</strong>
                                    {% if event.end_date and event.end_date != event.begin_date %}
                                        <br><small class="text-muted">до {{ event.end_date.strftime('%d.%m.%Y') }}</small>
                                    {% endif %}
                                    <br><span class="badge bg-info season-badge">{{ format_season(event.begin_date) }}</span>
                                {% else %}
                                    <span class="text-muted">Не указана</span>
                                {% endif %}
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge bg-primary">{{ event.categories|length }}</span>
                                {% if event.categories %}
                                    <br><small class="text-muted">
                                        {% for category in event.categories[:2] %}
                                            {{ category.name }}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}
                                        {% endfor %}
                                        {% if event.categories|length > 2 %}
                                            и еще {{ event.categories|length - 2 }}
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </small>
                                {% endif %}
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                {% set participants_count = event.participants|length %}
                                {% if event.exclude_free_from_reports %}
                                    {% set free_count = 0 %}
                                {% else %}
                                    {% set free_count = event.participants
                                        |selectattr('pct_ppname', 'equalto', 'БЕСП')
                    |rejectattr('exclude_free_from_reports')
                                        |list
                                        |length %}
                                {% endif %}
                                {% if participants_count > 0 %}
                                    <span class="badge bg-success me-1">{{ participants_count }}</span>
                                {% else %}
                                    <span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">0</span>
                                {% endif %}
                                {% if free_count > 0 %}
                                    <span class="badge bg-danger">{{ free_count }}</span>
                                {% endif %}
                            </td>
                            <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                    <a href="{{ url_for('public.event_detail', event_id=event.id) }}"
                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" 
                                            data-event-id="{{ event.id }}"
                                            onclick="showEventStats(this)">
                                        <i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        {% else %}
            <div class="text-center py-5">
                <i class="fas fa-trophy fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                <h5 class="text-muted">Турниры не найдены</h5>
                <p class="text-muted">Загрузите XML файл с результатами турнира</p>
                <a href="{{ url_for('admin.upload_file') }}" class="btn btn-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Загрузить файл
                </a>
            </div>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
function applySearch() {
    const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput')
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
    const searchValue = (searchInput ? searchInput.value : '').trim()
    if (searchValue) {
        params.set('search', searchValue)
    } else {
        params.delete('search')
    }
    window.location.href = window.location.pathname + '?' + params.toString()
}

function clearSearch() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
    params.delete('search')
    window.location.href = window.location.pathname + '?' + params.toString()
}

function goToEvent(eventId) {
    window.location.href = `/event/${eventId}`;
}

function showEventStats(element) {
    // Получаем ID события из data-атрибута
    const eventId = element.getAttribute('data-event-id');
    // Переходим на страницу детальной информации о турнире
    window.location.href = `/event/${eventId}`;
}

function filterBySeason(season) {
    // Обновляем активную кнопку
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-group .btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('active');
    });
    event.target.classList.add('active');
    
    // Фильтруем строки таблицы
    const rows = document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');
    rows.forEach(row => {
        const seasonBadge = row.querySelector('.season-badge');
        if (season === 'all' || (seasonBadge && seasonBadge.textContent.trim() === season)) {
            row.style.display = '';
        } else {
            row.style.display = 'none';
        }
    });
}

function updateFilters() {
    const rankFilter = document.getElementById('rankFilter');
    const monthFilter = document.getElementById('monthFilter');
    const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
    
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const searchValue = searchInput ? searchInput.value.trim() : '';
    if (searchValue) {
        params.set('search', searchValue);
    } else {
        params.delete('search');
    }
    
    if (rankFilter && rankFilter.value) {
        params.set('rank', rankFilter.value);
    } else {
        params.delete('rank');
    }
    
    if (monthFilter && monthFilter.value) {
        params.set('month', monthFilter.value);
    } else {
        params.delete('month');
    }
    
    window.location.href = window.location.pathname + '?' + params.toString();
}

function changeSorting() {
    updateFilters();
}

function changeRankFilter() {
    updateFilters();
}

function changeMonthFilter() {
    updateFilters();
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
    if (!searchInput) return;
    searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function (e) {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
            applySearch();
        }
    });
})
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

## Исходный код: `templates/first_timers_detail.html`

> 140 строк, 10,849 байт

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}{{ page_title or 'Новички и повторяющиеся — детальный отчёт' }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
        <h2 class="mb-0">{{ page_title or 'Новички и повторяющиеся — детальный отчёт' }}</h2>
        <a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="{{ pdf_url or url_for('analytics.first_timers_detail_pdf') }}">
            <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> Скачать PDF
        </a>
    </div>
    <p class="text-muted">
        По каждому турниру и разряду: кто считается повторяющимся, <strong>какой это по счёту раз</strong> выступления в разряде и <strong>все предыдущие турниры</strong>, где уже выступал.
        {% if is_free_only %}
        <br><em>В отчёте учтены только участия с бесплатным стартом (БЕСП).</em>
        {% endif %}
    </p>

    {% if report.totals %}
        {% set tot = report.totals %}
        {% set total_pct_novices = (tot.total_first_timers / tot.total_children * 100) | round(1) if tot.total_children and tot.total_children > 0 else none %}
        <p class="mb-2">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-secondary">Всего участий: {{ tot.total_children }}</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-success">Новички: {{ tot.total_first_timers }}</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-warning text-dark">Повторяющиеся: {{ tot.total_repeaters }}</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-primary">Новички от общего: {{ total_pct_novices ~ '%' if total_pct_novices is not none else '—' }}</span>
        </p>
        {% if is_free_only and (tot.repeaters_4plus_athletes or 0) > 0 %}
        <div class="alert alert-danger mb-3" role="alert">
            <strong><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> Внимание:</strong>
            <strong>{{ tot.repeaters_4plus_athletes }}</strong> спортсменов в этом отчёте выступили уже в <strong>4-й раз и чаще</strong> (бесплатный старт).
        </div>
        {% endif %}
    {% endif %}

    {% if report.events %}
        <div class="accordion mt-3" id="eventsAccordion">
            {% for event in report.events %}
                {% set event_collapse_id = 'eventCollapse' ~ loop.index0 %}
                {% set event_heading_id = 'eventHeading' ~ loop.index0 %}

                <div class="accordion-item">
                    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="{{ event_heading_id }}">
                        <button class="accordion-button collapsed d-flex align-items-center gap-2" type="button"
                                data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#{{ event_collapse_id }}"
                                aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="{{ event_collapse_id }}">
                            <span class="me-2"><strong>{{ event.event_name }}</strong></span>
                            <span class="text-muted small">{{ event.event_date_display }}</span>

                            <span class="ms-auto d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 align-items-center">
                                <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-secondary">Всего: {{ event.total_children }}</span>
                                <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-info text-dark">Бесплатно: {{ event.free_children }}</span>
                                <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-success">Новички: {{ event.first_timers }}</span>
                                <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-warning text-dark">Повторяющиеся: {{ event.repeaters }}</span>
                                {% set pct_novices_of_total = (event.first_timers / event.total_children * 100) | round(1) if event.total_children and event.total_children > 0 else none %}
                                <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-primary">Новички от общего: {{ pct_novices_of_total ~ '%' if pct_novices_of_total is not none else '—' }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </button>
                    </h2>

                    <div id="{{ event_collapse_id }}" class="accordion-collapse collapse"
                         aria-labelledby="{{ event_heading_id }}" data-bs-parent="#eventsAccordion">
                        <div class="accordion-body">
                            {# repeaters_detail = list; selectattr без теста фильтрует по truthy (непустой список) #}
                            {% set ranks_with_repeaters = event.rank_stats | selectattr('repeaters_detail') | list %}
                            {% if not ranks_with_repeaters %}
                                <p class="text-muted mb-0">Нет повторяющихся в этом турнире.</p>
                            {% else %}
                                {% set event_idx = loop.index0 %}
                                <div class="accordion accordion-flush" id="ranksAccordion{{ event_idx }}">
                                    {% for rank_stat in event.rank_stats %}
                                        {% if (rank_stat.repeaters_detail or []) | length > 0 %}
                                            {% set rank_idx = loop.index0 %}
                                            {% set rank_collapse_id = 'rankCollapse' ~ event_idx ~ '_' ~ rank_idx %}
                                            {% set rank_heading_id = 'rankHeading' ~ event_idx ~ '_' ~ rank_idx %}

                                            <div class="accordion-item">
                                                <h2 class="accordion-header" id="{{ rank_heading_id }}">
                                                    <button class="accordion-button collapsed py-2" type="button"
                                                            data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#{{ rank_collapse_id }}"
                                                            aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="{{ rank_collapse_id }}">
                                                        <span class="me-2">Разряд: <strong>{{ rank_stat.rank }}</strong></span>
                                                        <span class="ms-auto small text-muted">
                                                            Повторяющихся: {{ rank_stat.repeaters }} из {{ rank_stat.total_children }}
                                                        </span>
                                                    </button>
                                                </h2>
                                                <div id="{{ rank_collapse_id }}" class="accordion-collapse collapse"
                                                     aria-labelledby="{{ rank_heading_id }}"
                                                     data-bs-parent="#ranksAccordion{{ event_idx }}">
                                                    <div class="accordion-body pt-2">
                                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                                            <table class="table table-sm table-bordered table-hover">
                                                                <thead class="table-light">
                                                                    <tr>
                                                                        <th>ФИО</th>
                                                                        <th>Школа</th>
                                                                        <th>Очередной раз</th>
                                                                        <th>Все предыдущие выступления (турнир — дата)</th>
                                                                    </tr>
                                                                </thead>
                                                                <tbody>
                                                                    {% for r in rank_stat.repeaters_detail %}
                                                                        <tr>
                                                                            <td>{{ r.athlete_name }}</td>
                                                                            <td>{{ r.athlete_school or '—' }}</td>
                                                                            <td>{{ (r.appearance_number or (r.total_previous_count + 1) or '—') }}-й раз</td>
                                                                            <td>
                                                                                {% if r.previous_appearances %}
                                                                                    {% for prev in r.previous_appearances %}
                                                                                        <span class="d-block">{{ prev.event_name }} — {{ prev.event_date }}</span>
                                                                                    {% endfor %}
                                                                                {% else %}
                                                                                    —
                                                                                {% endif %}
                                                                            </td>
                                                                        </tr>
                                                                    {% endfor %}
                                                                </tbody>
                                                            </table>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        {% endif %}
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
    {% else %}
        <div class="alert alert-info">Нет данных о турнирах.</div>
    {% endif %}
</div>
{% endblock %}

```
